summary: VitalFlow v2.0 - All 4 features tested successfully. Backend: 17/17 tests passed. Frontend: All features working correctly including GestorDashboard with V-Score agregado, OAuth flow with 4-step modal, and Lei 14.831 intervention logic.

issues: Console warning about chart width/height being -1 - cosmetic issue, charts render correctly

backend: GET /api/health/trend - Returns 200 with trend, v_scores_7d, avg_7d, requires_intervention
GET /api/dashboard/team-overview - Response structure validated (avg_v_score, distribution, trend_7d, lei_14831_alerts)
POST /api/wearables/oauth/callback - sync_data contains HRV, BPM, sleep_hours, steps
POST /api/wearables/oauth/callback - Works with all providers (google_health_connect, apple_healthkit, garmin, fitbit)
frontend: Dashboard loads with gamification stats bar (Pontos de Energia, Streak)
Dashboard shows V-Score orb with status
Dashboard shows history chart with 9 analyses
GestorDashboard shows V-Score Time (69.7) - aggregated team score
GestorDashboard shows Estresse Medio (30.3) - inverted stress index
GestorDashboard shows Colaboradores count (25) with engagement rate (20%)
GestorDashboard shows V-Score trend chart (7 days) with line graph
GestorDashboard shows Distribution pie chart (Verde: 12, Amarelo: 4, Vermelho: 5)
ConnectDevices OAuth flow modal with 4 animated steps
ConnectDevices sync result displays HRV, BPM, Sono, Passos
ConnectDevices toast notification on successful sync

legacy_files_verification.broken_imports: NONE - No imports found in codebase

seed_data_creation: Test users created during backend tests (test_user_* for 403 access control test)
context_for_next_testing_agent: VitalFlow v2.0 features fully implemented and tested. GestorDashboard at /gestor route shows aggregated team metrics with LGPD compliance. ConnectDevices at /devices route has OAuth 2.0 flow with 4-step animated modal. Health trend endpoint returns Lei 14.831 intervention flags. Legacy files (AffectedAreas.js, HumanBodyHeatmap.js) have been removed with no broken imports.
mocked_apis: POST /api/wearables/oauth/callback (simulated OAuth - no real Google Fit/Apple HealthKit)

feature_1.name: Painel do Gestor conectado ao backend
feature_1.details: V-Score agregado (69.7), métricas LGPD, trend chart, distribution pie chart, export PDF

feature_2.name: Lógica de tendência 7 dias com flag Lei 14.831
feature_2.details: GET /api/health/trend returns trend (rising/stable/falling), requires_intervention flag, intervention_message

feature_3.name: Fluxo OAuth simulado para wearables
feature_3.details: 4-step animated modal, sync_data with HRV/BPM/Sono/Passos, toast notifications

feature_4.name: Remoção de legados
feature_4.details: AffectedAreas.js and HumanBodyHeatmap.js removed, no broken imports
